title.value: Scenario 1.3 - Serve BgZ resources of J.J.E. XXX_Enderman-Da Conceição (patient G)

description.value: Scenario 1.3 - Serve BgZ resources of J.J.E. XXX_Enderman-Da Conceição (patient G)
Serve Patient resource including the patient's general practitioner for HCIM Patient
Serve Coverage resource(s) including the insurer for HCIM Payer
Serve Consent resource(s) for HCIM TreatmentDirective
Serve Consent resource(s) for HCIM AdvanceDirective
Serve Observation resource(s) for HCIM FunctionalOrMentalStatus
Serve Patient resource (which contains the patient's first contact person) for HCIM ContactPerson
Serve Condition resource(s) for HCIM Problem
Serve Observation resource(s) for last known HCIM LivingSituation
Serve Observation resource(s) for HCIM DrugUse
Serve Observation resource(s) for HCIM AlcoholUse
Serve Observation resource(s) for HCIM TobaccoUse
Serve NutritionOrder resource(s) for HCIM NutritionAdvice
Serve Flag resource(s) for HCIM Alert
Serve AllergyIntolerance resource(s) for HCIM AllergyIntolerance
Serve MedicationStatement resource(s) including the medication for HCIM MedicationUse
Serve MedicationRequest resource(s) including the medication for HCIM MedicationAgreement

nts:contentAsserts.description: contains .medicationReference with reference to medication with code.coding.code = '58808'
contains .medicationReference with reference to medication with code.coding.code = '129225'
contains .medicationReference with reference to medication with code.coding.code = '105078'
contains .medicationReference with reference to medication with code.coding.code = '15933601'

description.value: Serve MedicationDispense resource(s) including the medication for HCIM AdministrationAgreement
Serve DeviceUseStatement resource(s) including the device for HCIM MedicalDevice
Serve Immunization resource(s) for HCIM Vaccination
Serve Observation resource(s) for HCIM BloodPressure
Serve Observation resource(s) for last known HCIM BodyWeight
Serve Observation resource(s) for last known HCIM BodyHeight
Serve Observation resource(s) for HCIM LaboratoryTestResult
Serve Procedure resource(s) for HCIM Procedure
Serve ProcedureRequest resource(s) for HCIM Procedure
Serve Encounter resource(s) for HCIM Contact
Serve Careteam resource(s)
